title: acer japonicum f. aureum
intro: Acer japonicum f. aureum, also known as the full moon maple, is a deciduous shrub or small tree with vibrant golden leaves and a delicate, lacy texture. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Acer japonicum f. aureum include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions or as a natural remedy for skin care.
